sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Tondela is in poor form, having lost their last 3 matches without scoring a goal, conceding 7 in total. Estoril Praia also struggles, with no wins in their last 7 matches, but they have managed to score in recent games, netting 3 goals in their last 2 league matches.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last 2 head-to-head matches, results have been tight, with Estoril Praia winning 1-0 and a 0-0 draw. Estoril has historically had the upper hand, winning 3 of the last 5 matchups against Tondela.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Tondela's stats show defensive frailties (7 goals conceded, 0 scored) and low possession (38.3%), ranking them 18th in the league. Estoril, slightly better at 14th, has shown some attacking intent with 3 goals scored but struggles defensively, conceding 4 in 2 games.

sections.subtitle: Key Trends
sections.text: Tondela often concedes first (4/5 matches) and has failed to keep a clean sheet in 5 games. Estoril matches frequently see both teams scoring (6/8) and over 2.5 goals (7/9), suggesting a potential for an open game.

halftimeSections.subtitle: First half overview
halftimeSections.text: The first half of the match between Tondela and Estoril Praia ended with Estoril leading 1-0 thanks to a late goal by Yanis Begraoui. Tondela had a slight edge in ball possession and showed intent with frequent entries into the final third and penalty area. However, they failed to convert their chances, missing a big opportunity. Estoril, despite having less of the ball, were more clinical, capitalizing on their major chance to take the lead just before the break. Both teams showed competitiveness in duels, with Estoril dominating aerial battles while Tondela held a marginal edge on the ground.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum
halftimeSections.text: The attacking momentum in the first half saw several shifts between the two sides. Tondela started with a strong push, dominating the early minutes with consistent attacking spells. Around the middle of the half, Estoril took control, building sustained pressure and creating dangerous moments that eventually led to their goal. Tondela responded with renewed energy towards the end of the half, showing bursts of intent, but Estoril managed to regain momentum in the closing stages to secure their advantage.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key player performances
halftimeSections.text: For Tondela, Pedro Henryque stood out as a potential threat, having taken a shot on target and being involved in a missed big chance. Defensively, players like Bebeto and Christian Marques contributed with multiple clearances to keep Estoril’s attacks in check. On the Estoril side, Yanis Begraoui was the standout performer, scoring the crucial goal and posing a constant danger. André Lacximicant also played a pivotal role with an assist and key passes that helped create openings for his team.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Tactical observations
halftimeSections.text: Tondela’s approach in the first half focused on maintaining possession and pushing into dangerous areas, but their finishing let them down. Their defensive structure held up for most of the half but was caught out late by Estoril’s precise attacking move. Estoril, on the other hand, adopted a more direct style, making the most of their opportunities despite spending less time on the ball. Their ability to win aerial duels gave them an edge in physical battles, which could be a factor in the second half as well.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: Looking ahead to the second half, Tondela will likely come out with increased urgency to level the score, leveraging their home advantage and possession-based play. They need to be sharper in front of goal to convert their chances. Estoril, holding the lead, might focus on defending their advantage while looking to exploit counter-attacking opportunities. Their physical dominance in the air could play a key role in maintaining control during set pieces. Both teams are expected to push for goals, with Tondela desperate to equalize and Estoril aiming to secure the win.
